query:
INSERT INTO questions (sectorId, skillAreaId, category, targetRoles, questionText, questionType, minValue, maxValue, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder, helpText, weight) VALUES
-- ORGANIZATIONAL LEVEL (global)
(NULL, NULL, 'organizational', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How well does your organization support continuous professional development and training?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 1, '1 = No support at all, 5 = Excellent support with dedicated resources', 1.2),
(NULL, NULL, 'organizational', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'To what extent does your organization have a formal training needs assessment process?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 2, '1 = No formal process, 5 = Comprehensive structured process', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'organizational', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How aligned is the current training program with your organization''s strategic goals?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 3, '1 = Not aligned, 5 = Fully aligned', 1.1),
(NULL, NULL, 'organizational', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'Does your organization have adequate budget allocated for training and development?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 4, NULL, 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'organizational', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How effective is leadership in promoting a learning culture within the organization?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 5, '1 = Leadership does not promote learning, 5 = Leadership actively champions learning', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'organizational', '["trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How regularly does your organization review and update its training programs?', 'multiple_choice', 1, 5, true, true, 6, NULL, 0.9),
-- JOB/TASK LEVEL (global)
(NULL, NULL, 'job_task', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How well do you understand the specific competencies required for your current role?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 1, '1 = Very unclear, 5 = Completely clear', 1.2),
(NULL, NULL, 'job_task', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'To what extent do you have access to the tools and resources needed to perform your job effectively?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 2, '1 = No access, 5 = Full access to all needed resources', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'job_task', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How often are job performance standards reviewed and communicated to employees?', 'multiple_choice', 1, 5, true, true, 3, NULL, 0.9),
(NULL, NULL, 'job_task', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'Are there clearly defined performance indicators for your role?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 4, NULL, 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'job_task', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How frequently do you encounter tasks that require skills you currently lack?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 5, '1 = Never, 5 = Very frequently', 1.1),
(NULL, NULL, 'job_task', '["trainer","assessor"]', 'How well do current training materials reflect the actual job tasks and requirements?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 6, '1 = Not at all, 5 = Perfectly aligned', 1.0),
-- INDIVIDUAL LEVEL (global)
(NULL, NULL, 'individual', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How would you rate your current proficiency level in your primary area of work?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 1, '1 = Beginner, 5 = Expert', 1.3),
(NULL, NULL, 'individual', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How motivated are you to participate in training and professional development activities?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 2, '1 = Not motivated, 5 = Highly motivated', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'individual', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'Have you received formal training or certification in your current field within the last 2 years?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 3, NULL, 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'individual', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How confident are you in applying new skills learned through training to your actual work?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 4, '1 = Not confident, 5 = Very confident', 1.1),
(NULL, NULL, 'individual', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How would you assess the gap between your current skills and the skills required for career advancement?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 5, '1 = Very large gap, 5 = No gap', 1.2),
(NULL, NULL, 'individual', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'Do you have a personal development plan that outlines your training goals?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 6, NULL, 0.9),
-- TRAINING FEASIBILITY (global)
(NULL, NULL, 'training_feasibility', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How feasible is it for you to attend training programs given your current workload?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 1, '1 = Not feasible at all, 5 = Very feasible', 1.1),
(NULL, NULL, 'training_feasibility', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'Does your organization provide paid time off for training and professional development?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 2, NULL, 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'training_feasibility', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'What is your preferred mode of training delivery?', 'multiple_choice', 1, 5, true, true, 3, NULL, 0.8),
(NULL, NULL, 'training_feasibility', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How accessible are training facilities or online learning platforms in your location?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 4, '1 = Very inaccessible, 5 = Very accessible', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'training_feasibility', '["hr_officer","trainer"]', 'Does your organization have the infrastructure to support blended or e-learning programs?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 5, '1 = No infrastructure, 5 = Fully equipped', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'training_feasibility', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How willing is management to release staff for training activities?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 6, '1 = Not willing, 5 = Very supportive', 1.1),
-- EVALUATION & SUCCESS CRITERIA (global)
(NULL, NULL, 'evaluation_success', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How effectively does your organization measure the impact of training on job performance?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 1, '1 = No measurement, 5 = Comprehensive measurement system', 1.2),
(NULL, NULL, 'evaluation_success', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'Are training outcomes and success criteria clearly defined before programs begin?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 2, NULL, 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'evaluation_success', '["trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How regularly is post-training follow-up conducted to assess skill retention?', 'multiple_choice', 1, 5, true, true, 3, NULL, 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'evaluation_success', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'To what extent do you feel training programs have improved your work performance?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 4, '1 = No improvement, 5 = Significant improvement', 1.1),
(NULL, NULL, 'evaluation_success', '["industry_worker","trainer","assessor","hr_officer"]', 'How well does your organization use training evaluation data to improve future programs?', 'rating', 1, 5, true, true, 5, '1 = Data is not used, 5 = Data drives all program improvements', 1.0),
(NULL, NULL, 'evaluation_success', '["hr_officer","trainer","assessor"]', 'Does your organization track return on investment (ROI) for training programs?', 'yes_no', 1, 5, true, true, 6, NULL, 0.9);

-- Update options for multiple_choice questions
UPDATE questions SET options = '["Never","Annually","Semi-annually","Quarterly","Monthly"]' WHERE questionText LIKE '%How regularly does your organization review%';
UPDATE questions SET options = '["Never","Rarely","Sometimes","Often","Always"]' WHERE questionText LIKE '%How often are job performance standards%';
UPDATE questions SET options = '["Face-to-face classroom","Online/e-learning","Blended learning","On-the-job training","Workshops and seminars"]' WHERE questionText LIKE '%preferred mode of training%';
UPDATE questions SET options = '["Never","After each program","Quarterly","Annually","Only when issues arise"]' WHERE questionText LIKE '%How regularly is post-training follow-up%';
